channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Babar Azam Leads PSL 11 Team of the Year After Stellar Season
item.description: Pakistan Cricket Board (PCB) announced the official 'Team of the Year' for the 11th edition of HBL Pakistan Super League (PSL), with Peshawar Zalmi captain Babar Azam at the helm. Babar finished as th...

item.title: Archbishop urges government to tackle insecurity and high fuel prices before 2027 elections
item.description: Archbishop JohnPrasie Daniel, founder of Dominion Chapel International Churches, don appeal to Federal Government make dem take urgent action against di rising insecurity and di wahala wey high fuel p...

item.title: Eta Aquariids Meteor Shower Visible in the UK Skies
item.description: The Eta Aquariids meteor shower, a spectacular celestial event caused by the debris from Halley's Comet, is set to be visible in the skies over Britain. Occurring every year in early May, this meteor ...

item.title: IHC upholds lease cancellation of One Constitution Avenue, denies ownership rights to apartment buyers
item.description: The Islamabad High Court (IHC) has upheld the cancellation of the lease for the high-profile One Constitution Avenue project, ruling that apartment buyers do not hold ownership rights in the property....

item.title: Africa Forward Summit to Discuss African-Led Security Solutions and Financing Models
item.description: The Africa Forward Summit, set to take place on May 11-12, 2026, in Nairobi, will bring together leaders, policymakers, and civil society actors to focus on new ways to address the continent’s securit...

item.title: Analyzing the Physics Behind Lightsaber Blades in Star Wars
item.description: On Star Wars Day, the question of whether lightsaber blades have mass is examined through the lens of physics. While characters in the movies often call them 'laser swords,' lightsabers cannot be simp...

item.title: Barzaga remains calm amid House expulsion talks
item.description: Representative Elpidio Barzaga has expressed that he is not worried about reports regarding a potential expulsion from the House of Representatives. Despite the ongoing discussions and media attention...

item.title: Kayole Boy and Family Move to Fully Furnished 3-Bedroom Home in Machakos
item.description: Fourteen-year-old Tito Wambua from Kayole has finally moved with his family to a new three-bedroom affordable housing unit in Machakos. The young boy became a guardian for his siblings and caretaker f...

item.title: Princess Eugenie and Jack Brooksbank expecting third child
item.description: Princess Eugenie and her husband Jack Brooksbank are expecting their third child, set to arrive later this year, Buckingham Palace has confirmed. The couple’s sons, August, five, and Ernest, two, are ...

item.title: Modi's BJP Secures Significant Win in West Bengal Elections
item.description: Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi and his Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) achieved a notable victory in West Bengal, a state traditionally dominated by opposition parties. According to preliminary resu...

item.title: Three fatalities and four rescued after yacht capsizes off South Ballina, NSW
item.description: A tragic boating accident occurred off the coast of South Ballina in New South Wales on Monday evening, resulting in the deaths of three people. Emergency services were alerted at approximately 6:15pm...

item.title: Tanga Port Urges Clients to Use Free Storage Period and Avoid Delays
item.description: Tanga Port Manager, Salehe Mbega, has reminded all stakeholders and clients using Tanga Port to make full use of the free cargo storage period provided. During a Port Improvement Committee meeting at ...

item.title: The Need for a More Targeted Immigration Policy in Canada
item.description: John Weissenberger argues that Canada has yet to fully debate the fundamental questions surrounding immigration, such as whether it primarily serves short-term economic needs or long-term national pro...

item.title: Robert F. Kennedy Jr. Launches Podcast Focused on Food and Celebrity Guests, Avoiding Vaccine Topics
item.description: Robert F. Kennedy Jr., currently serving as Secretary of Health and Human Services, recently launched a new podcast aimed at promoting 'radical transparency in government.' Despite initial expectation...

item.title: Internal Auditors Investigate Persistent Financial Losses in Tanzania Public Projects
item.description: Dar es Salaam. The Institute of Internal Auditors Tanzania (IIA) imeanza study ya kuona sababu za kupotea kwa fedha mara kwa mara kwenye miradi ya maendeleo, michakato ya ununuzi na shughuli zingine z...

item.title: Southern California Weather Shifts from Light Rain to Heat Wave for Mother’s Day
item.description: Southern California will experience a notable weather transition this week. Early in the week, light drizzle and cloudy, cool conditions are expected across the region, particularly in the eastern San...

item.title: Limited-Time Discount: Bring a Colleague to TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 and Save 50% on a Second Pass
item.description: TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 is offering a limited-time promotion for attendees: buy one pass and get 50% off a second pass of the same ticket type. This offer is valid from May 4 to May 8, 2026, encouragi...

item.title: Mexico's 2026-2030 Connectivity Plan: Combining 5G, Satellites, and Local Operators to Expand Internet Access
item.description: Mexico's National Connectivity Plan 2026-2030 aims to increase nationwide internet coverage from 94% to 98% by 2030, reaching over 1.4 million additional people, with special focus on vulnerable areas...

item.title: ASIC launches insider trading investigation into Accent Group and its CEO Daniel Agostinelli
item.description: Accent Group, the major Australian sporting and footwear retailer behind popular chains such as Platypus and Hype DC, is currently under scrutiny from the Australian Securities and Investments Commiss...

item.title: DOJ clarifies Comey indictment involves multiple matters beyond Instagram post
item.description: On May 4, 2026, the Acting Attorney General emphasized that the indictment of former FBI Director James Comey encompasses more than just a single Instagram photo, clarifying public misconceptions. The...
